twitter_thread: 40% of API keys are hardcoded in source code, putting $100k+ in revenue at risk.
Hashicorp's Vault and Ory's API Key server can reduce key exposure by 80%.
Rotating API keys every 30 days can cut breach damage in half, from 120 to 60 days.
Role-based access control can limit API key privileges by 90%, preventing lateral movement.
AWS CloudWatch and Google Cloud Logging can detect 95% of API key abuse within 1 hour.
Implementing rate limiting can block 99% of API key brute-force attempts.
What's the worst API key management mistake you've seen? #apimanagement #security
pack.linkedin: A single exposed API key can cost $100k+ in revenue. Yet, 40% of API keys are hardcoded in source code. Tools like Hashicorp's Vault and Ory's API Key server can reduce key exposure by 80%. Rotating keys every 30 days and using role-based access control can further minimize risk. How do you prioritize API key security in your organization?
